product.name: Art3d PVC 3D Wall Panel, Decorative Wall Tile in White 12-Pack 19.7"x19.7"
features: Eye-catching: The sharp 3D relief of the geometric pattern will catch the eyes of everyone who run into it right away, tranform a dull space to an aesthetic one
Easy DIY: It's light, thin yet sturdy which make it easy to be processed when it comes to install
Pack detail: 12-pack of tile with size 19.7"x19.7", covers 32 sq.ft
Installation: Installed by glue or command strips over any smooth and flat substrates
Versatile Application: It's suitable for residential and commerical to both wall and ceiling decoration
